omitted_declarations.policy_reference: 5.5. Advertising and Advertising Measurement Partners: we may share Your personal information in order to facilitate targeting, delivery, and measurement of online advertising on third-party services, or otherwise facilitate the transmission of information that may be useful, relevant, or of interest to you. Such partners include: Facebook Inc. (https://www.facebook.com/privacy/policy/). We do not share children's personal information for these purposes.

5.7. Publicly available information: Our Sites may offer publicly available chats, forums, and blogs that are viewable by others. Please note that You post publicly available information at your own risk. We are not liable for any information that You voluntarily choose to be public through such and/or other explicit actions. You should be aware that any information you provide on these communication services -including your Account information may be read, collected, and used by any member of the public who accesses these communication services. We urge you to consider the sensitivity of any information you input into these Services. To request removal of Your personal information from publicly accessible websites operated by Us, please contact us as specified below. In some cases, we may not be able to remove your information, in which case we will let You know if we are unable to, and why.

5.5. Advertising and Advertising Measurement Partners: we may share Your personal information in order to facilitate targeting, delivery, and measurement of online advertising on third-party services, or otherwise facilitate the transmission of information that may be useful, relevant, or of interest to you. Such partners include: Facebook Inc. (https://www.facebook.com/privacy/policy/). We do not share children's personal information for these purposes.
